# Bug Report
## What
> What are we talking about? Give context here to anyone would understand what part of the system we are talking about

## Where
> Where does this occur, if its on the client give the page, if its in the server give the feature segment

## Reproduction steps (With device information if applicable)
> How do you get the application into this state? Video and Pictures help here

## Expected
> What should happen when the application is in this state? 

## Actual
> What currently happens when the application is in this state? Again, Video and Pictures help here (you may just want to use "See above" if the repo steps video clearly shows the bug in action)
